title: My Trims
description: This mod adds Client side armor trims it has all the trims and customizable using mod menu can save 4 load outs use Shift + B and B to turn it on and off all rendering is done Client side works all servers.
body:
This mod adds Client side armor trims it has all the trims and customizable using mod menu can save 4 load outs use Shift + B and B to turn it on and off all rendering is done Client side works all servers. 



***Note: This mod replaces trims only on your side. You already render trims locally. If you have real physical trims, others will see those, but you will see this mod’s trims instead. If you do not have physical trims, others will see nothing, and you will see your preset trims.**


![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01eb12839a7699848f5eeeb1b6e381179769789a_0.webp)



<details>

</details>
